case_title: MULLER PHILIP VS GHILOTTI BROTHERS CO. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,689.72 FILED BY MULLER PHILIP AS TO DEFENDANT GHILOTTI BROTHERS CO. SF GRINDING COMPANY, INC. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-18-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MULLER PHILIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GHILOTTI BROTHERS CO. $1,689.72 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,704.72, ALL DEFTS WAIVED DEFECTS IN SERVICE. SF GRINDING CO AGREED TO SUBSTITUTE AS A DEFT IN PLACE OF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
